title: I made a game that teaches you how AI works
abstract: I made a game that teaches you how AI works may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often outperform general platform...
abstract_zh: 我开发了一个游戏，教你怎么玩转AI！虽然这个领域有点小众，但我的游戏就像狙击手一样精准打击你的知识盲区。在这个快节奏的AI世界里，专治各种不懂技术术语的小伙伴，快来体验吧！AI不是梦，玩转它很简单！
